events.title: Move & Reset
events.details: Lunchtime movement class (60 min) with Yael Flexer. Open to adults of all ages and abilities; improvisation, guided exercises, and gentle movement. £12 per session; £40 for the 4-week course (booking fee applies on site).

events.title: How the voice moves: a poetry & dance improv workshop
events.details: Poetry and dance improvisation workshop. Omnibus Theatre, SW4 0QW.
